zh.lifeSummary: 當John Malet於1323年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特恩莫 卡素時，他的父親Baldwin de Malet37歲，母親Avicia Raleigh38歲。他於1349年與Elizabeth de Kingston在英國薩默塞特恩莫 卡素結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。他去世於1369年在英國英格蘭薩默塞特享年46歲。

nameMeanings.name: Malet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: nickname from a diminutive of Mal ‘bad’ or from a derivative of the related Old French word maleit ‘accursed’ (see Mallet 1). Compare Malette .
French: from the Old French personal name Malet, a pet form of Malo (compare Mallet 2).

variants.name: Mal
meanings: Slovenian: nickname for a physically small man, from mal ‘small, little’.

variants.name: Malette
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Gaston, Alphonse, Francois, Jacques, Rejean, Serge.
French: variant or feminine form of Malet and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this, reflecting the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When John Malet was born in 1323, in Enmore Castle, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, his father, Baldwin de Malet, was 37 and his mother, Avicia Raleigh, was 38. He married Elizabeth de Kingston in 1349, in Enmore Castle, Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. He died in 1369, in Somerset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Malet est né en 1323, à Enmore Castle, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Baldwin de Malet, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Avicia Raleigh, avait 38 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth de Kingston en 1349, à Enmore Castle, Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Il est décédé en 1369, à Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 46 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: John Maletが1323年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトエンモー カストルで生まれた時，父Baldwin de Maletは37歳，母Avicia Raleighは38歳であった。1349年にイギリスソメルセトエンモー カストルでElizabeth de Kingstonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子の親であった。彼は1369年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトで46歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Malet(이)가 1323년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 모어 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Baldwin de Malet(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Avicia Raleigh(은)는 38세였다. 그는 1349년 영국 서머세트 모어 카스틀에서 Elizabeth de Kingston(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1369년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Malet родился в 1323 г. в местности энмор кастл, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Baldwin de Malet было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Avicia Raleigh, 38. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth de Kingston в 1349 г. в местности энмор кастл, сомирсет, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Он умер в 1369 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 46 лет.
